competitors.name: WaterSense Pro
strengths: Established brand with 5+ years in market
weaknesses: Only 3 parameters (pH, TDS, temp) vs our 6
Cellular data costs $15-25/mo per unit ongoing
recentMoves: Announced partnership with municipal water consortium
competitors.ourResponse: WQM-1 at $999.99 with 6 channels, LoRaWAN (no cellular fees), GPS, open-source. $175 COGS gives pricing flexibility they can't match. Over 3 years, LoRa saves $540-900/unit vs cellular.

competitors.name: AquaMetrics
weaknesses: No hardware — software-only, requires third-party sensors
IoT gateway not shipping until Q4 2026
Higher price point for software subscriptions
recentMoves: Announced IoT gateway product for Q4 2026
competitors.ourResponse: We ship hardware + software integrated at $999.99. Their gateway is vaporware until Q4. waterquality.trading is a unique differentiator. cloud.bluesignal.xyz is free.

competitors.name: DIY / Arduino
weaknesses: No cloud platform or compliance features
recentMoves: Growing interest in open-source environmental monitoring
competitors.ourResponse: WQM-1 IS open-source but production-grade. $999.99 for a complete 6-channel system with LoRaWAN, GPS, cloud dashboard, and marketplace — vs months of DIY integration.

battleCards.scenario: Customer says WaterSense Pro is cheaper
battleCards.response: WaterSense Pro measures only 3 parameters — you'd need 2 units to match our 6. Plus cellular costs $15-25/mo per unit. WQM-1 at $999.99 with LoRaWAN has zero ongoing data costs.

battleCards.scenario: Customer asks why not wait for AquaMetrics gateway
battleCards.response: AquaMetrics announced for Q4 2026 — 6+ months away. We're shipping now at $999.99 with hardware + cloud + marketplace integrated. Time-to-insight matters.

battleCards.scenario: Customer says they can build it themselves
battleCards.response: You can prototype with Arduino for $50-200 in parts. But 24/7 outdoor deployment with 6-channel calibration, LoRaWAN, GPS, cloud dashboards, and nutrient credit marketplace — that's 6-12 months of engineering. WQM-1 is open-source AND production-ready at $999.99.
Hardware is open-source — you're never locked in. Raspberry Pi based, standard sensors. cloud.bluesignal.xyz is free. We're pre-revenue but our $175 COGS gives us runway competitors don't have.

products.name: WQM-1

products.name: Nutrient Credit Marketplace
products.description: Marketplace for verified water quality nutrient credits. Connects distributed water producers with utility demand.
